allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://ombbgasscrpkuejpgwvc.supabase.co/pg" -H "apikey: $SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.svea_orders \(id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\), client_order_number TEXT NOT NULL, svea_order_id BIGINT NOT NULL UNIQUE, event_id INTEGER NOT NULL, form_data JSONB NOT NULL, customer_email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''''pending'''' CHECK \(status IN \(''''pending'''', ''''completed'''', ''''failed''''\)\), booking_number TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now\(\)\); ALTER TABLE public.svea_orders ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;""}')
